documentation.description:
The RAW IMU readings for secondary 9DOF sensor setup. This message should
contain the scaled values to the described units

record_types.name: Scaled_Imu2

fields.name: Xgyro
fields.description:
Units: [mrad/s]
Angular speed around X axis

fields.name: Ygyro
fields.description:
Units: [mrad/s]
Angular speed around Y axis

fields.name: Zgyro
fields.description:
Units: [mrad/s]
Angular speed around Z axis

fields.name: Temperature
fields.description:
Units: [cdegC]
Temperature, 0: IMU does not provide temperature values. If the IMU
is at 0C it must send 1 (0.01C).
